name: Altus Parks and Rec
description: Come play pickleball at Altus Parks and Rec in Altus, OK! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Martha Road Baptist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Martha Road Baptist Church in Altus, OK! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.
